meta.name: FangTrack design tokens
meta.rebrand: 2026-07-19 — Mike-approved full rebrand from the FangTrack Design project: blue-dominant (#2563eb) + purple accent (#a855f7), zinc neutrals, oklch rarity ladder. One deviation from the Design draft, per Mike's sign-off: the Exceptional deal badge keeps its exclusive violet #7c3aed instead of #a855f7 so Legendary rarity and Exceptional can never be confused.

sources_of_truth.rarity_and_deal_badges: theme.py — RARITY_TIERS / DEAL_BADGES. The values are MIRRORED here for tooling; tests/test_tokens.py fails the suite if they drift. Change them in theme.py, never here.
sources_of_truth.everything_else: This file. tokens/fangtrack.css and the email templates consume these values.

meta.pairing_rule: Rarity tier = one CORE colour on the ladder oklch(0.66 0.20 H). The pill derives from the core: bg = core @15% alpha (10% light theme), text = oklch(.78 .14 H) (.45 light), border = core @35% (25% light). Deal grades are the OPPOSITE treatment — FILLED chips (solid core bg; white text on dark cores, near-black on light cores) — so the two systems never read alike even where they share a hue.
meta.escalation_logic: Rarity hue ladder, rarest -> most common: H 340 pink -> 300 purple -> 260 blue -> 200 teal -> 150 green -> neutral gray. A 7th tier extends the ladder at the hot end (H ~25 orange-red) with the same formula.
meta.hue_sharing: Hues are meaning-families shared across systems by design: purple #a855f7 = Legendary/accent/private-seller, blue #3b82f6 = Rare/Strong/link, green #22c55e = Common/Fair/price-down-good. Treatment (translucent pill vs filled chip vs plain text) is what disambiguates, plus the Exceptional-violet exception.
meta.theme_note: The web product ships dark-only. The light block is for emails/new surfaces; values marked derived await the full Design-project files.

rarity._mirror_of: theme.py RARITY_TIERS — do not edit here. bg/border derive from core @15%/@35%.

deal._mirror_of: theme.py DEAL_BADGES — do not edit here. Filled chips, unlike translucent rarity pills.

source_markers._note: Text-only, no background. Dimmed variant + ° suffix = inferred, not stated. Never let a guess look like a fact.

light._note: Emails/new surfaces only; neutrals DERIVED (zinc-light) pending the full Design-project files. Soft variants drop to 10% alpha, borders to 25%.
